title: Hut 8 Closes $3.25 Billion of Investment-Grade Senior Secured Notes in Landmark Financing for River Bend Data Center Project
text: Hut 8 River Bend Data Center Financing. Closed $3.25 billion offering of senior secured notes through subsidiary Hut 8 DC LLC. Ratings: BBB− by both S&P Global and Fitch. Coupon: 6.192% with 2042 maturity. Project: 245-megawatt data center with related substation at River Bend campus, supported by 15-year triple-net lease. Non-Recourse Structure: Fully amortizing 16.5-year tenor matched to construction and lease periods, eliminates refinancing risk. Capital Recovery: Returns approximately $184 million in prior equity contributions for redeployment. Market Milestone: First investment-grade construction bond issued for single-sponsor data center project. Institutional Support: J.P. Morgan led offering with Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley as joint bookrunners. Significantly oversubscribed order book demonstrated strong institutional confidence. Data center supported by 15-year lease with Fluidstack (Google-backed) with $7.0 billion base contract value.
